Patch release. Post-v0.1.0 polish based on a 4-agent holistic review (skills, manifests, docs, plugin best-practices). No new features; functional behavior unchanged for normal flows. Both fixes are user-visible polish that improves first-time-visitor experience and removes silent edge-case footguns.

## Tier-1 fixes

- **README staleness rewrite** — README.md still claimed "v0.0.1 is current release" with a "What v0.0.1 verifies" section. Now reflects v0.1.0 as shipped (4 skills + 2 hooks + bundled CANONICAL.md), with an updated Roadmap including v0.1.1+ deferred items.
- **`query-wiki` trigger boundary** — description's "natural-language questions when clearly asking against the vault" line was too broad and conflicted with the design intent that bare questions don't trigger the structured-query skill. Replaced with "Use this skill ONLY when the user explicitly invokes structured vault querying" + explicit negative example. Bare-question vault consultation remains handled by the SessionStart `vault-first-reminder` hook.
- **`lint-vault` A1 walk-up canonical extension annotation** — A1's domain-root-boundary detection extends canonical's hardcoded list with user-named root-indexes detected via Step 2.3. The extension is now flagged explicitly in SKILL.md so future readers don't assume strict canonical alignment.
- **Manifest metadata enrichment** — `plugin.json` and `marketplace.json` now include `homepage`, `repository`, and expanded `keywords` per the [Plugins reference](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins-reference). Marketplace listings now have a clickable "view source" path.
- **`LICENSE` file** — `plugin.json` declared MIT but no LICENSE file existed at the repo root. Added MIT text so GitHub auto-detects the license and downstream users can verify.
- **`.github/v0.1.0-release-notes.md` tracked** — formerly an untracked artifact; now in repo as a CHANGELOG-equivalent. Future release notes will land beside it as `.github/v0.X.Y-release-notes.md`.
- **`.gitignore` expansion** — added `.claude/settings.local.json` (per-user permission state, should not be shared), macOS resource forks (`._*`), IDE local state (`.idea/`, `.vscode/`), build artifacts, log files.

## Tier-2 selected (low-effort polish)

- **`vault-first-reminder.sh` defensive default** — when `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT` is unset (debugging edge case), the SessionStart hook output now reads `<plugin-root-not-set; check Cowork plugin install path>` instead of producing a literal `/CANONICAL.md`. Self-describing for misconfigurations.
- **`CANONICAL.md` table of contents** — 479-line doc now has a 15-entry TOC at the top with one-line descriptions per section. Cross-references like "see Sub-Wiki Criteria → Option 2" are now navigable.
- **`lint-vault` template `L.RL.B` expansion** — formerly a 2-line "(Same structure with en labels …)" stub; now a full code block matching `L.RL.A` semantics so the template can't be misread as truncated.

## Tier-3 deferred to v0.1.1+

- `PostToolUse` hook for frontmatter validation (semantic depth)
- `InstructionsLoaded` hook for schema governance
- Plugin assets (icon 32×32 + banner 1200×400) — needs design work
- Frontmatter mapping table dedup (setup ↔ add-page)
- Locale auto-detect 3-way shared reference (refactor)
- `add-page` Step 6.1 nudge threshold-crossing (avoid every-≥7 fire)
- Bash regex coverage gaps (`sed -i`, `find -delete`, `chmod`, `chown`)
- Version drift mitigation (`bump-version.sh`)

## Verification

- `grep -r "claude/rules" plugin/` returns no matches (canonical references all use `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/CANONICAL.md`)
- `grep -r "v0.0.1 (current release)" README.md` returns no matches
- `grep -r "What v0.0.1 verifies" README.md` returns no matches
- `grep -r "coming soon" skills/` returns no matches (already cleared in dev.17)
- `vault-first-reminder.sh` tested with `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT=""` produces self-describing default
- `LICENSE` will be detected by `gh repo view` license field on next sync
